blocks.description: Program header comments, LIBNAME definitions for raw, staging, and target risk schemas, OPTIONS for macro debugging and output formatting
DATA step computing individual risk factors from loan applications: LTV ratio, DTI ratio, credit utilization rate, payment history score, and missing-data flag
PROC MEANS computing population-level benchmarks (mean, std, percentiles) for risk factor distributions on valid records
PROC SQL joining application risk factors with credit bureau data (FICO, bankruptcy flag, inquiries, tradeline history, derogatory count)

DATA step implementing scorecard-based risk bucketing using SELECT/WHEN logic: assigns points for LTV, DTI, and FICO ranges, computes raw score, and classifies into PRIME/NEAR_PRIME/SUBPRIME/DEEP_SUB buckets
DATA step applying pre-estimated logistic regression coefficients to compute probability of default (PD) via logit transform, and expected loss calculation using LGD assumption
DATA step applying policy overrides and final credit decision: PD-based approve/review/decline logic with hard cutoffs for bankruptcy, minimum FICO, maximum LTV, and DTI guideline breaches
